text:
$ sysrc kld_list
kld_list: if_ath_pci if_ath cuse4bsd sysctlinfo sysctlbyname_improved coretemp nvidia-drm

> Is the problem reproducible with graphics/nvidia-drm-515-kmod (in lieu of nvidia-drm-510-kmod) similarly built from ports?

I cannot install that one as it's for FreeBSD 14+ only.  Let me check if I can upfrade to FreeBSD 14.0-BETA1.
